title: Feso'ota'iga Faaletagata
subtitle: Fa'amatalaga fa'amatalaga taimi moni
clickMic: Kiliki masini faaleotele leo e amata tautala ai
enableMic: Amata le vasega e mafai ai le masini faaleotele leo
noTranslations: O fa'aliliuga o le a fa'aalia iinei

startModal.title: Amata le Sauniga Faaletagata?
startModal.desc: Ole vasega lea ole a fa'aliliu mai

waitingDesc: Faamolemole faatali iinei. E otometi lava ona amata lau Sauniga Fa'aletagata pe a feso'ota'i lou faia'oga.
